zh.lifeSummary: Adele Champagne於0987年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆蒙特迪迪。她於大約1009年與Baudouin II de Clermont在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1057年1月26日在她的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adele Champagne于0987年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆蒙特迪迪。她于大约1009年与Baudouin II de Clermont在法国豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1057年1月26日在她的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

nameMeanings.name: Champagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Armand, Marcel, Lucien, Cecile, Emile, Normand, Pierre, Alain, Antoine, Evens, Fernand.

French: habitational name from Champagne, a historical province in the northeast of France, named in Latin as Campania (from campus ‘plain, flat land’). This is also the name of various villages in France, and in some cases the surname may derive from one of these. This surname is also found in Haiti (see also 2 below). Compare Champaign , Champaigne , Champine , and Shampine .
Haitian: from Champagne (see 1 above), used as a nickname or personal name.

en.lifeSummary: Adele Champagne was born in 0987, in Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. She married Baudouin II de Clermont about 1009, in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 26 January 1057, in her hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Adele Champagne est née en 0987, à Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Elle a épousé Baudouin II de Clermont environ 1009, à Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 janvier 1057, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Adele Champagne wurde 0987 in Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat um 1009 in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Baudouin II de Clermont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Januar 1057 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Adele Champagne è nata il nel 0987 nel Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Lei sposato Baudouin II de Clermont circa 1009, nel Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 gennaio 1057, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adele Champagneは0987年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメモントディディエルで生まれた。約1009年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼクラーモントでBaudouin II de Clermontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1057年1月26日に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adele Champagne(은)는 0987년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 몽디디어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1009년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 클레몽에서 Baudouin II de Clermont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1057년 1월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adele Champagne nasceu em 0987, em Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Ela casou-se com Baudouin II de Clermont aproximadamente 1009, em Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1057, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Adele Champagne родилась в 0987 г. в местности монтдидиир, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baudouin II de Clermont около 1009 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 января 1057 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Adele Champagne nació en 0987, en Montdidier, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Se casó con Baudouin II de Clermont aproximadamente 1009, en Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de enero de 1057, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
